name: HLA-E/NKG2A senescent-cell immune evasion study
summary: Human cell and tissue study examining HLA-E expression on senescent cells and testing whether NKG2A-axis blockade boosts NK and CD8 T-cell responses against senescent cells in vitro.
population: Human dermal fibroblast cell systems, young and old human skin sections, and human melanocytic nevi tissue comparisons
